description_long: This is a tall, curvaceous glass bottle filled with bright orange juice, capped with a small, round, metallic screw cap. The bottle features a prominent front label with the brand 'SPAMELLO' and a vivid illustration of whole and sliced oranges, clearly indicating the juice flavor. The sides and back of the bottle display additional labels, including a nutritional information panel and product details, all printed on a light background with green and orange accents. The glass surface is smooth and glossy, reflecting light and giving the bottle a clean, fresh appearance. The cap is metallic and likely requires twisting to open, while the bottle's shape is ergonomic for easy gripping. This object is typical of single-serving or family-sized juice bottles found in urban environments such as convenience stores, cafes, or picnic areas.
description: A tall, curvy glass bottle of orange juice with a metallic screw cap, colorful branding, and a vivid orange hue.
description_view_0: The back side of the orange juice bottle, showing a label with nutritional and product information.
description_view_1: A side view of the bottle, highlighting the nutritional information panel and part of the branding.
description_view_2: The front of the bottle, featuring the 'SPAMELLO' brand label and an illustration of oranges.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the bottle, showing a large block of text and part of the orange illustration.
